content.heading: Volunteer with Us
paragraphs: Sign up to participate and volunteer at our featured event — the Bayou Family Fishing Spring Rodeo on April 25, 2026.
Whether you can swing a hammer, captain a boat, or just show up with enthusiasm — there's a place for you at Bayou Family Fishing. Our community is built by the people in it.
Maintenance/Construction Something's always broken out here — boats, docks, camp buildings. If you can swing a hammer or turn a wrench, we need you.
Licensed Captains Licensed captain? We're building a network of guides willing to take our members out on short-notice trips. Good folks, good fishing, fair rates.
Fishing/Boating Instructors Teach the basics — casting, knots, catch-and-release — then help us turn BFF into a competitive team on the water.
Innisfree We're building a camp four miles out in the marsh, starting from nothing. Ask about becoming a plank owner.
Media & Storytelling Photograph events, shoot video, write up the stories. Somebody's got to tell this right.
Camp Coordination Help us plan and run Bayou Charity and BFF events — cookouts, rodeos, community days.
